results.rendered_html:
praguṇa (1. pra + guṇa) adj. f. ā schnurgerade; in rechter Lage, Ordnung u. s. w. befindlich; = ṛju, prāñjala  AK. 3,2,21 .  TRIK. 3,1,26 .  H. 1456 .  VYUTP. 146 . śramajayātpraguṇāṃ (Schol. in der Calc. Ausg.: prakṛṣṭā guṇā yasyām) ca karotyasau (mṛgayā) tanum  RAGH. 9,49 . anila (im Körper)  SUŚR. 1,264,20 . 2,432,17 . ˚racanā  DAŚAR. 1,4 .
— Vgl. a˚.

results.rendered_html:
praguṇa a.
1 Straight, honest, upright (lit. and fig.); bahiḥ sarvākārapraguṇaramaṇīyaṃ vyavaharan  Māl. 1. 14. 
2 Being in the right state or condition, having excellent qualities; śramajayātpraguṇāṃ ca karotyasau tanumato'numataḥ sacibairyayau  R. 9. 49. 
3 (a) Worthy, suitable, meritorious;  Māl. 1. 16.  (b) Efficient; 9. 45. 
4 Skilful, clever. (praguṇīkṛ means
1 To make straight, put in order, arrange.
2 To make smooth.
3 To nourish, bring up).
